title: Win Home configuration backups
source_paths: Windows host metadata and selected config files; /opt/frigate config; nginx; Docker; netplan; sshd; Ollama overrides
verification: manifest.json with SHA-256 hashes and archive byte counts
notes: Excludes media, VHDX, model files, databases, logs, build output, and private keys; production task uses a restricted SSH key copy under C:/ProgramData/KRT/ConfigBackup/ssh.

title: Router and VPN hub configuration backups
source_paths: OpenWrt sysupgrade config backup; UCI/network/firewall/mwan3 evidence; Moscow VPS AmneziaWG/Hysteria/sing-box/OpenVPN/WireGuard/UFW/sysctl/systemd VPN configs; split-route AmneziaWG client config
verification: manifest.json with SHA-256 hashes and archive byte counts
notes: Contains operational secrets and private keys; raw archives are retained only in backup storage and must not be committed to git.
